data.title: LastPass Breach in 2022 Linked to Significant Cryptocurrency Theft
data.description: According to Foresight News, blockchain investigator ZachXBT has revealed that the password manager LastPass was breached in 2022, resulting in the theft of cryptocurrency valued in the nine-figure range. The team at LastPass has reportedly been concealing the full extent of the attack and has allegedly engaged in aggressive tactics against numerous confirmed victims. Recently, in a forfeiture complaint, law enforcement authorities have publicly acknowledged the possibility that LastPass could be held accountable for the stolen cryptocurrency.

data.title: US Secret Service: Has seized the website domain of Russian cryptocurrency exchange Garantex and frozen its assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The US Secret Service said it has seized the website domain of the Russian cryptocurrency exchange Garantex and frozen its assets. (Jinshi)

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC on Solana
data.description: According to Foresight News, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury recently minted 250 million USDC on the Solana blockchain. This development occurred just a minute ago, highlighting the ongoing activity and expansion of digital currency operations on Solana.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has liquidated 87.8664 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past 4 hours, the entire network had a liquidation of 87.8664 million US dollars, of which long positions had a liquidation of 52.0993 million US dollars and short positions had a liquidation of 35.7672 million US dollars.

data.title: White House official: Crypto summit will focus on reversing Biden's policies that undermine the industry, and will not discuss tax issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A senior White House official confirmed that Trump’s White House Crypto Summit will not discuss tax issues, but will focus on revoking the destructive policies implemented by the former Biden administration. The official said in a virtual preview: "There will be no tax initiatives. You know, the cryptocurrency Internet is full of rumors [...] I don’t know how some of these things started. President Trump promised to set up a cryptocurrency committee during his campaign, and he hopes to listen to suggestions and feedback from the industry. This is the purpose of the summit." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BNB Chain will hold a Pascal hard fork upgrade on March 20 to support EIP-7702
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: BNB Chain will conduct a mainnet Pascal hard fork on March 20, 2025 to improve EVM compatibility and become one of the first public chains to adopt EIP-7702. This upgrade will introduce features such as Gas abstraction, EOA wallet smart contract, and batch transactions to provide users with a smoother experience and bring greater flexibility to developers.
Through the EIP-7702 proposal, BNB Chain will allow externally owned accounts (EOA) to temporarily have smart contract functions during transactions while maintaining the security of the account. This upgrade will significantly lower the barrier for users to enter Web3. For example, the gas fee abstraction allows users to complete on-chain interactions without having to hold native tokens that pay for gas fees in their accounts. At the same time, it allows dApps to sponsor gas fees for users, batch transactions, and other functions to enhance the user on-chain experience.
Previously, the Pascal hard fork had been completed on the testnet. For the upcoming mainnet upgrade, node operators and validators need to update to v1.5.7 (BSC) or v0.5.2/v0.5.6 (opBNB) before March 20; exchanges and infrastructure providers need to ensure compatibility before the hard fork, and developers need to test and update dApps to support new transaction types.
According to BNB Chain’s 2025 technical roadmap, the community plans to conduct the Lorentz hard fork in April and implement the Maxwell hard fork upgrade in June to increase the block generation speed to 0.75 seconds. The proposal is currently open for community comment.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Lowers 2025 U.S. GDP Growth Forecast
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Morgan Stanley has revised its forecast for the United States' GDP growth in 2025, reducing it from an earlier estimate of 1.9% to 1.5%.

data.title: ONDO Drops 10% Amid OUSG Deployment on the XRP Ledger
data.description:
TL;DR Ondo Finance has recorded a 10% drop in its market value following the implementation of its tokenized fund OUSG on the XRP Ledger. The integration of OUSG into the XRP Ledger facilitates institutional investors’ access to a product that combines security, regulatory compliance, and yield.
